title: Crumbly Indian Cheese Crumble
description: A savory, crumbly festive Goan dish featuring cheese slices that are air-fried to perfection, perfect for a low-carb-friendly snack or light meal.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the crumbled cheese, flour, salt, and pepper. Stir gently until the mixture becomes crumbly.
Spread half of the crumbly cheese mixture evenly onto a lightly floured baking sheet or flat surface.
Gently press down on the cheese mixture to create an even layer about 0.5 cm thick.
Drizzle sesame seeds over the top of the cheese mixture, pressing them into the mixture slightly with your fingers or a fork.
Air fry for approximately 6-7 minutes, until golden brown and crisp.
Remove from air fryer to cool slightly, then break apart any large pieces that haven't fully crisped up. Serve warm as a snack or light meal.
